prompt: Write a complete A2UI v0.8 surface for a multi-step checkout form. It should have a TextField for email, a MultipleChoice for shipping method (Standard, Express, Overnight), a summary Card showing order total, and a submit Button. Use data binding so the form state is stored in the data model and the summary card reads from it.

assertions.name: uses-flat-adjacency-list
assertions.description: All components are in a flat list with ID references, not nested JSON

assertions.name: textfield-has-data-binding
assertions.description: TextField uses value: { path: '...' } to bind email to the data model

assertions.name: multiplechoice-present
assertions.description: MultipleChoice (or ChoicePicker) component present with options for shipping methods

assertions.name: card-reads-from-data-model
assertions.description: Summary Card contains Text components that use path binding to show order data

assertions.name: dataModelUpdate-included
assertions.description: dataModelUpdate message included to initialize form state

assertions.name: beginRendering-is-last
assertions.description: beginRendering is the final message in the sequence
